title: Structure Music
description: Adds music triggers to a configurable list of structures, modifiable via resource pack
body:
Adds music events to a configurable list of structures, modifiable via resource pack. On its own (at least for now) all music triggers play Eld Unknown. The music triggers in the sounds.json are as such: "music.structure_one", "music.structure_two", all the way to "music.structure_eighteen". While its possible I may integrate adding custom music tracks directly into the mod in the future, that's kinda beyond the scope of my capabilities at the moment, still learning here. I also may attempt to add a fade-out option to the music at some point, but I wasn't sure where to begin with that, so if it's something you know how to do and want it in the mod, by all means send a pull request on GitHub.

 Will I port this to other versions?

...Maybe. Probably even, but that depends on whether or not anyone actually seems interested in me doing so, or if the motivation strikes me at some point.
